tasks.label: Docker: Reset DB
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --build

tasks.label: Docker: Bootstrap Galaxy
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/bootstrap_galaxy.php

tasks.label: Docker: Backfill Star Metadata
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/backfill_star_system_metadata.php --all --batch=2000

tasks.label: Test: NPC Avatar + Leader Smoke
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_npc_avatar_leader_system.php

tasks.label: Test Data: Bulk Universe Seed
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/seed_test_universe.php --users=100 --npcs=20 --profiles=0

tasks.label: Test Data: Full Seed (One Click)
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/bootstrap_galaxy.php; docker compose exec -T web php scripts/backfill_star_system_metadata.php --all --batch=2000; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_gameplay_model_v1.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v1.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v2.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v3.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v4.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; docker compose exec -T web php scripts/sync_faction_specs.php; Get-Content -Raw sql/test_gameplay_model_seed.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/test_gameplay_model_checks.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; docker compose exec -T web php scripts/seed_test_universe.php --users=100 --npcs=20 --profiles=0
